name: Peter Paul Mounds Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together 2 cups of sugar and 1 cup shortening in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift the flour into another bowl.
5. Alternately add the sifted flour and 1 cup milk to the sugar mixture, beginning and ending with flour. Mix until just combined.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour batter evenly into three greased and floured cake pans.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. While cakes are baking, combine 1 cup sugar and 1 cup milk in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
10. Add coconut flakes and marshmallows; continue boiling for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
11. Stir in vanilla extract until well combined.
12. Once cakes have cooled slightly, spread filling between layers while still warm. Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting.
13. For icing: In a separate bowl, combine sugar, margarine (butter), and evaporated milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until mixture forms a soft ball when a small amount is dropped into cold water.
14. Remove from heat and stir in cocoa powder until smooth.
15. Frost the cooled cake layers with the icing, covering the top and sides completely.
